calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Carla Contreras CSR: Lois Jones (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Fno Bhuti, is appearing in propia persona.

Hindi/Tibeten Interpreter, Tenzin Choephel, is present to interpret for the petitioner.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Fno Bhuti Quan is sworn and examined by the Court through the interpreter.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the change of name of the Minors at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Tenzin Bhuti. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
